Buyer Invitation
KITA 1:1 Business Matching Program

Discover curated Korean brands and meet export-ready suppliers through a premium buyer program designed for meaningful business matching in Paris.

June 18 (THU) - 20 (SAT)
Paris Expo Porte de Versailles, Pavilion 5, France

Greetings from Korea International Trade Association (KITA)

We are pleased to invite you to the KOREA EXPO in Paris 2026 1:1 Business Matching Program to be held in Paris, France. This exclusive B2B platform offers you direct access to carefully selected, export-ready Korean companies across high-demand sectors such as K-Beauty, K-Food, and K-Lifestyle.

Through pre-arranged meetings, you can efficiently discover innovative Korean products, connect with reliable Korean suppliers, and explore business opportunities tailored to your sourcing needs.

 Why Join

Curated Korean Brands

Meet carefully selected Korean exhibitors with strong export readiness, differentiated products, and growing relevance for the European market.

Curated 1:1 Business Matching

Save time through pre-arranged meetings based on your product interests, category needs, and business objectives.

Trend-Driven Sourcing

Explore K-Beauty, K-Food, K-Lifestyle, and other promising categories shaped by current consumer trends and brand storytelling.

Business Expansion Opportunity

Take advantage of this program to connect with new Korean suppliers, strengthen partnerships, and grow your business network.

 How It Works
1

Apply Online

Submit the Buyer Registration form via the link below.

›
2

Get Confirmed

We review your application and confirm your participation.

›
3

Request Meetings

Review the exhibitor list and nominate companies you want to meet.

›
4

Receive Schedule

KITA pre-arranges your meetings and sends you a schedule.

›
5

Meet in Paris

Attend the venue and conduct meetings on-site.

 Program Overview
Event KOREA EXPO in Paris 2026 ??1:1 Business Matching Program
Date June 18 (THU) - 20 (SAT), 2026
Venue Paris Expo Porte de Versailles, Pavilion 5, France
Main Categories
K-Beauty K-Food K-Lifestyle K-Contents K-Tour K-Education
Meeting Format Pre-arranged 1:1 business meetings with selected Korean suppliers
Buyer Benefits Exhibition entrance badge, Interpretation support, *Travel support
* Travel support criteria may vary ??please contact us for further details

We would be delighted to welcome you in Paris

Please take a moment to review the event details and confirm your interest at your earliest convenience.
Upon confirmation, we will support your meeting arrangements and event preparation.

Who can apply? Importers, distributors, wholesalers, retailers & e-commerce buyers
